rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.555, which addresses student immunity from liability in the P-TECH program. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.555. IMMUNITY FROM LIABILITY. A student who participates in the P-TECH program while enrolled in a school district or at an open-enrollment charter school is entitled to immunity in the same manner as a professional employee of a school district under Subchapter B, Chapter 22, or as an employee of an open-enrollment charter school under Section 12.1056, as applicable.
_note: No conflict: the rule concerns student liability immunity in P-TECH programs and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
